welcome_offer.description: Watchlist offer: Wells Fargo Premier Autograph reportedly offers 100,000 bonus points after spending $4,000 in purchases within the first 3 months. Verify eligibility and issuer-visible terms before creating production card data.
notes: Adaptor coverage added as a watchlist config because production data/cards/wells-fargo-premier-autograph.json does not exist yet.
Secondary sources describe Premier Autograph as similar to Autograph Journey but with a higher 100k intro bonus and possible Premier-client eligibility constraints.
source_conflicts: Wells Fargo public card directory may not expose a dedicated Premier Autograph landing page to all users.
Autograph Journey public offer remains 60k after $4k/3mo, so do not merge this into Autograph Journey data.

open_questions: Create production data/cards/wells-fargo-premier-autograph.json only after confirming the card should be listed separately from Autograph Journey.
Confirm whether Premier Autograph requires Wells Fargo Premier relationship eligibility or is broadly available.
Find an issuer-controlled landing page or authenticated offer page before treating the 100k value as public.

community.summary: Adds a watchlist adaptor config for Wells Fargo Premier Autograph without changing production card inventory. Treat 100k as secondary-source/client-eligibility-sensitive until issuer confirmation.

observations.excerpt: Secondary coverage describes a Premier Autograph product with a 100k intro bonus and similarity to Autograph Journey.
